title: Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of violating US-brokered ceasefire
summary: Both nations have traded allegations of breaking a three-day truce, with reports of continued fighting on the Vovchansk axis. International observers and media outlets are analyzing the fragility of the ceasefire amid ongoing accusations of bad faith from both Moscow and Kyiv.

title: Donald Trump rejects Iran's response to US peace proposal as unacceptable
summary: Donald Trump has dismissed Iran's counter-terms for ending the regional conflict, leading to a sharp rise in global oil prices and volatility in international stock markets. Iranian officials have warned of new attacks while describing US demands as unreasonable, as coverage across Western and Middle Eastern media highlights the breakdown in negotiations.

title: Vladimir Putin proposes Gerhard Schröder as mediator for Ukraine negotiations
summary: The Russian president suggested the former German chancellor as a preferred negotiator for the conflict in Ukraine. The proposal was met with mixed reactions, including a rejection from the German government and criticism from EU officials who labeled the suggestion cynical.

title: South Korean vessel damaged by explosion in the Strait of Hormuz
summary: The South Korean government is investigating a strike on an HMM vessel in the Strait of Hormuz, with officials debating whether to join a US-led maritime mission. While the main opposition party has criticized the government for not explicitly naming Iran as the perpetrator, Seoul has stated that attacks on civilian ships will not be tolerated.
